name: Leader's Advantage Acquisition Corp.
business: Leader's Advantage Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated any substantive discussions. It currently intends to concentrate its efforts on chemical and healthcare companies in the life-sciences industry, including the specialty chemicals and pharmaceutical industries.
